name: Flag Change Audit
summary: Webhook-driven audit + collision prevention + knowledge base registry upsert per flag event.

name: Registry Reconciliation
summary: Monthly full-registry reconciliation + messaging summary.

name: Stale Flag Cleanup
summary: Weekly stale-flag scan with Linear cleanup tickets, knowledge base status updates, and a messaging digest.

name: Lean Sweep
summary: Single-tool deterministic sweep with file:line idea creation.

name: Baseline Refresh
summary: 6-hour baseline recompute for order / signup / integrity detectors.

name: Event Routing & Anomaly Detection
summary: Real-time classify + enrich + route + email + anomaly-scan per Supabase webhook event.

name: Weekly Digest
summary: Weekly formatted messaging layout digest: signups, orders, flag changes, anomalies by severity, WoW trends.

name: Daily Memory Flush
summary: Daily compile pass — raw memories → compiled wiki articles via platform IPC.

name: Session Capture
summary: Drain + extract + store raw session memories per execution.

name: Weekly Memory Health Check
summary: Weekly audit for stale / contradictory / gap memories, with manual_review surfacing.

name: Skill-Update Issue Writer
summary: On approve → fetch review body → file GitHub/GitLab issue with diff and slug marker.

name: Skill Audit & Proposal
summary: Weekly audit — propose skill edits and retirements as reviewable diffs.

name: User Deletion & Offboarding
summary: Soft-delete + farewell email + masked churn alert per auth provider user.deleted event.

name: Email Change Propagation
summary: Sync email change from auth provider to Supabase + confirmation email.

name: Onboarding Drip Sequence
summary: Daily onboarding drip advancement (Day-1 / Day-3 / Day-7 emails).

name: User Signup
summary: Signup fan-out across Supabase + messaging + email + local onboarding state.

name: Codebase Coverage Scan
summary: Incrementally raise test coverage: scan the codebase, write missing tests for the next uncovered module, validate, and track progress in memory.

name: Codebase Bug Hunt
summary: Find bugs in the codebase, file new findings for human triage, and track reported issues in memory to avoid duplicates.

name: Scheduled Architecture Review
summary: On a schedule, review codebase architecture and publish an ADR + task breakdown, tracking decisions in memory.

name: Idea Architecture Analysis
summary: Evaluate a proposed idea against the architecture and emit a scoped implementation plan for downstream delivery.

name: Code Review
summary: Review code for security/correctness/quality, cite file:line fixes, and return an APPROVE/REQUEST_CHANGES verdict.

name: Release Automation
summary: On merge, bump semver, update changelog, draft release notes, and tag — recording version decisions in memory.

name: Sync Documentation
summary: Keep README + changelog in sync with shipped code by analyzing new commits since the last processed point.

name: PR Test + Merge
summary: On dev-clone.pr.created, test the PR in an isolated worktree and enable auto-merge / approve / request-changes per the standards policy.

name: Domain Scan
summary: Daily variant generation, DNS resolution, and new-registration detection against a persistent ledger.

name: Anomaly Response
summary: Critical-severity incident response with correlation-driven root-cause hypothesis.

name: Continuous Monitoring
summary: Scheduled metric collection + baseline learning + warning-level anomaly detection.

name: Periodic Digest
summary: Rolling operations summary of triage, drafting, and graduation stats.

name: On-demand Status
summary: Manual full-ledger status report without reminder escalation.

name: Scheduled Scan
summary: Periodic sweep with graduated reminder batching and auto-resolution.

name: Change Monitor
summary: Real-time deal change detection with urgency-graded alerts.

name: Stale Deal Watch
summary: Tiered stale-deal escalation (channel → owner DM).

name: Sentry Issue Scan
summary: Fetch unresolved Sentry issues with memory-aware noise filtering.

name: Inventory Watch
summary: Threshold inventory alerts with sell-through velocity + estimated stockout.

name: Order Stream
summary: Per-order logging + classification + high-value immediate alerts.

name: Refund Watch
summary: Refund logging + quality-issue alerting.

name: Portfolio Re-audit
summary: Weekly portfolio delta report across all tracked audits.

name: Error Event Ingestion
summary: Event subscription + periodic polling to build the 90-day rolling error index.
